---
name: Design partner request
about: Bring a real workflow, pilot, or paid problem for Klava to target.
title: "[Design Partner] "
---

Thanks for your interest in testing or shaping `Klava`.

This issue is public. Do not post secrets, customer data, credentials, or private infrastructure details.

## Team or role

Who are you, and what kind of operator, engineer, or team would use Klava?

## Workflow you want Klava to handle

Describe the real task:

- what starts broken or unfinished;
- what the operator has to inspect or change;
- what a good outcome looks like;
- what is risky today.

## Why existing tools are not enough

What is missing from chat tools, scripts, RMM products, remote desktop, shell aliases, or current agent products?

## Environment

Examples:

- Windows or macOS
- local dev machine, support workstation, consultant laptop, internal IT, migration project
- languages, stacks, or tools involved

## Urgency, budget, or timeline

If this is tied to a real deployment, migration, support load, or paid pain, say so plainly.

## Contact path

Leave a public contact method only if you are comfortable doing that.
